params.name: Othello
params.description: Othello is a masterpiece by Shakespeare, telling the tragic love story between the Moorish general Othello and his wife Desdemona. In the story, Othello, deceived by the slander of his ensign Iago, mistakenly believes that his loyal wife Desdemona has betrayed him with his lieutenant Cassio. Driven by anger and jealousy, he kills his innocent wife with his own hands. After the truth is revealed, a remorseful Othello ends his own life. It inspires deep reflection on multiple themes such as trust, …
